name: parallight-lab
description:
Parallight Lab — agent-oriented learning plugin for Codex CLI. Learn to build AI agents by directing them, guided by a resident master craftsman (Marvin). Zero API keys (LLM runs through Parallight's backend).

Trigger when the user's message starts with :lab (:lab, :lab-login, :lab-start <lab-id>, :lab-status, :lab-kb, :lab-logout, :lab-exit) or asks in natural language to log into Parallight, browse/start/continue a lab, check lab progress, or exit a lab.

interface.shortDescription: 学 AI agent 实战:指挥 agent、理解、验证
interface.longDescription: 在 Codex 里跟着Mentor Marvin 做 agent 实战。用 :lab 命令(:lab-login / :lab / :lab-start <id> …)或自然语言唤起。零 API key。
